channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: How Malayalam Subtitles Helped Bring World Cinema to Local Audiences
item.description: During the late 1990s and early 2000s, film societies in Kerala experienced a decline due to dwindling memberships and the rise of satellite television. However, the mid-2000s saw a revival sparked by...

item.title: NTSA sets KSh 3,050 standard fee for Smart driving licence renewal in Kenya
item.description: The article explains the updated NTSA driving licence renewal process and fees in Kenya following the full rollout of the Smart Driving Licence (Smart DL). Currently, all motorists are required to ren...

item.title: Fiancé of Ashlee Jenae Shares Grief and Tribute After Her Sudden Death in Zanzibar
item.description: Social media influencer Ashly Robinson, popularly known as Ashlee Jenae, tragically passed away on April 9 while on vacation in Zanzibar with her fiancé, Joe McCan. The couple had gone to the coastal ...

item.title: Fertiliser shortages linked to Iran conflict could drive up global food prices next year
item.description: Fertiliser shortages caused by the ongoing conflict involving Iran are expected to significantly impact global food prices, warns Mark Preston, executive trustee of the historic Grosvenor Group. UK fa...

item.title: Supreme Court questions time spent on religion-related disputes amid heavy caseload
item.description: NEW DELHI: The Supreme Court of India, in a significant hearing on Wednesday, raised concerns about the extensive time devoted to religious disputes given its massive backlog of cases. A nine-judge be...

item.title: Napo County Gains Recognition for Its Rich Birdlife and Conservation Efforts
item.description: Napo County, located on the China-Vietnam border in the southwest of Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region, has become a hotspot for birdwatchers. On 26 March, the county hosted its first bird-watching com...

item.title: Fire in Taguig Displaces 11 Families, Homes Destroyed
item.description: A fire broke out in Taguig City early on May 7, 2026, leaving 11 families homeless. Local authorities reported that the blaze quickly spread through a residential area, destroying multiple houses. For...

item.title: Eight-Year-Old Boy Bitten by Rabid Beaver at New Jersey Lake
item.description: An eight-year-old boy was bitten by a rabid beaver while fishing with his family at Lake Henry in Continental Soldiers Park, Mahwah, New Jersey. The incident occurred on Sunday evening, shortly before...

item.title: Updated Ballon d’Or 2026 Rankings After Champions League Exits
item.description: The 2026 Ballon d’Or race is heating up, especially after Arsenal and Paris Saint-Germain made it to the Champions League final. Arsenal reached their first final in 20 years by defeating Atletico Mad...

item.title: Pakistan Focuses on Using Domestic Funds to Address Climate Change
item.description: At the Breathe Pakistan Climate Conference, Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb highlighted that Pakistan possesses sufficient local financial resources to confront the impacts of climate change. He s...

item.title: Brandt’s REAL Purchase Proposal Nears Final Approval
item.description: Regina-based entrepreneur Brandt is on the verge of completing the acquisition of REAL, with the deal reportedly only one vote short of approval. The potential purchase has generated considerable atte...

item.title: Starmer appeals to voters as Labour faces historic local election losses
item.description: Labour is preparing for potentially record-breaking losses in the local elections across England, which could have serious implications for Prime Minister Keir Starmer's leadership. In a last-minute a...

item.title: Microsoft emphasises worker involvement in AI adoption for fair workplace outcomes
item.description: Australia’s establishment of a national tripartite AI Employment and Workplaces Forum has been welcomed as a timely move. The initiative brings together government, employers, and unions, signalling a...

item.title: Ben Askren’s recovery journey after a double lung transplant
item.description: Former MMA fighter and Olympic wrestler Ben Askren went through a life-changing period after being diagnosed with severe pneumonia in 2025, which led to a double lung transplant. During his hospital s...

item.title: Nigeria faces rising cyberattacks weekly and urgent need for better data security
item.description: Nigeria dey face serious cyber wahala as NDPC report show say country dey experience over 4,000 cyberattacks every week. Na serious problem because e dey cost country about ₦12 billion for 2024 alone....

item.title: Lancashire council announces potential withdrawal from government refugee resettlement programmes
item.description: Lancashire County Council, currently led by Reform UK, has announced its intention to withdraw from the government-funded refugee resettlement programmes, including the UK Resettlement Scheme (UKRS) a...

item.title: Nyeri Court Grants KSh 1 Million Bond to Police Officer Accused of Karatina Businessman’s Killing
item.description: A police constable, Peter Wamiti, has appeared in Nyeri High Court denying charges of murder following the death of George Gathu, a Karatina businessman, at Rubis Petrol Station. Gathu, aged 40, was r...

item.title: Dignitaries Celebrate Mrs. Boma Ogan’s 60th Birthday in Okrika
item.description: On May 6, 2026, prominent Nigerian figures gathered to celebrate the 60th birthday of Mrs. Boma Ogan, eldest daughter of former Rivers State Governor Chief Rufus Ada George, and wife of Ambassador Ida...

item.title: US hotel demand lags expectations ahead of 2026 FIFA World Cup
item.description: Hotel bookings across major United States host cities for the 2026 FIFA World Cup are falling short of early expectations, according to a survey by the American Hotel and Lodging Association (AHLA). W...

item.title: From Kenyan TV Actor to Long-Haul Truck Driver in the US: The Story of Joakim Mwangi
item.description: Joakim Mwangi, widely known in Kenya as Katuosis from the drama series Jungu Kuu, has embarked on a completely new journey in the United States as a long-haul truck driver. At 38 years old, Mwangi has...
